data.title: The Dow Jones index dropped by around 900 points due to Trump's Greenland tariff threats; gold stocks outperformed.
data.description: On Tuesday, the Dow Jones index plummeted by approximately 900 points due to President Trump's proposed tariffs on Greenland. Gold stocks saw a notable increase in performance during this tumultuous trading session. The current stock market scenario showcases a significant decline in the Dow due to these tariff threats. This news has impacted various sectors of the market, with live coverage providing updates on the situation.

data.title: Bitcoin's price could spike to $85k due to new whales, as analysts warn of potential distribution risk amid volatile movement.
data.description: Financial experts believe that the unpredictable fluctuations in Bitcoin's price signal a growing likelihood of dispersal as fresh large holders of BTC influence the market. The question arises whether a decline to $85,000 could be imminent.

data.title: GitHub debuts SLSA Build Level 3 Security, offering full code-to-cloud traceability for enterprises with new APIs and traceability tools.
data.description: GitHub has introduced advanced APIs and artifact tracking tools for enterprises to track software from source code to production deployment with cryptographic verification. This development is aimed at enhancing transparency and security in software development processes. With the release of these new features, companies can now effectively monitor the flow of their software assets with precision. This move is likely to benefit a wide range of businesses, as the APIs and tools provide robust support in ensuring the integrity and authenticity of code, making the deployment process more reliable. The update signifies a significant step towards promoting trust and efficiency in software development practices, offering improved capabilities to track and verify software artifacts. This advancement is crucial for enterprises seeking to streamline their software development lifecycle and ensure secure deployment mechanisms. The APIs and artifact tracking tools by GitHub are poised to revolutionize how businesses manage and validate their software, setting a new standard in the industry.

data.title: New STEM school in Albuquerque's Westside by Building Hope will serve 1,200+ students, opens by 2026-27.
data.description: A philanthropic organization specializing in developing educational facilities for kindergarten through 12th grade, Building Hope, will be spearheading the transformation of an unused eight-acre site on the Westside of Albuquerque. The property is set to be converted into the future home of the Albuquerque School of Excellence by the start of the 2026–27 academic year. The initiative is a part of an ongoing effort to provide improved educational infrastructure in the region. The project is based in Albuquerque, New Mexico and was announced on January 20, 2026.

data.title: Metropolitan Water District is starting project to boost water supply for LA and Ventura counties hit by drought.
data.description: Los Angeles, Metropolitan Water District of Southern California will commence the Sepulveda Feeder Pump Stations project to enhance water reliability in areas of Los Angeles and Ventura counties. These regions faced significant water reduction mandates due to the unprecedented drought in 2020-2022. The project involves pushing Colorado River water and stored resources from Diamond Valley Lake, the largest reservoir in Southern California. This initiative aims to bolster water supplies for communities impacted by the recent drought.
